---
title: "gp_factor_smooth"
generated: true
description: "Build a factor-smooth GP interaction (mgcv `bs='fs'` with a GP marginal)."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.stats.basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gp_factor_smooth -->
```python
gp_factor_smooth(x: Float[Array, ' n'], group: Int[Array, ' n'], n_basis: int = 10, *, kernel: str = 'matern52', rho: Optional[float] = None, amplitude: float = 1.0, boundary: float = 1.5, bounds: Optional[Tuple[float, float]] = None, center: bool = False, n_levels: Optional[int] = None) -> _FactorGPBasis
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gp_factor_smooth -->
Build a factor-smooth GP interaction (mgcv `bs="fs"` with a GP marginal).

A separate Hilbert-space GP curve of `x` for each level of `group`, all
sharing **one** smoothing parameter (so the per-group curves are random
deviations with a common amplitude -- partial pooling).  This is the
**fixed-`rho`** building block of the hierarchical GP: drop it into
[`gam_fit`](../nitrix-stats-gam/gam_fit.qmd) alongside a population [`hsgp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/hsgp_basis.qmd) of
the same `rho` (and the intercept) for the "GS" hierarchical GP.  For
*estimated* `rho` and the full variance-component report, use
[`hgp_fit`](../nitrix-stats-hgp/hgp_fit.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gp_factor_smooth -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `n` | ‚Äî | `(n,)` covariate. |
| `group` | `Int` | `n` | ‚Äî | `(n,)` integer factor labels `0 .. L-1`. |
| `n_basis` | `int` | ‚Äî | `10` | Per-group HSGP rank `m` (default `10`; the design is `L` times this wide, so a smaller rank than [`hsgp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/hsgp_basis.qmd) is usual). |
| `kernel` | `str` | ‚Äî | `'matern52'` | HSGP marginal parameters (see [`hsgp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/hsgp_basis.qmd)); `rho` defaults to the data half-range (a fixed value -- lengthscale estimation is [`hgp_fit`](../nitrix-stats-hgp/hgp_fit.qmd)). |
| `rho` | `Optional[float]` | ‚Äî | `None` | HSGP marginal parameters (see [`hsgp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/hsgp_basis.qmd)); `rho` defaults to the data half-range (a fixed value -- lengthscale estimation is [`hgp_fit`](../nitrix-stats-hgp/hgp_fit.qmd)). |
| `amplitude` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1.0` | HSGP marginal parameters (see [`hsgp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/hsgp_basis.qmd)); `rho` defaults to the data half-range (a fixed value -- lengthscale estimation is [`hgp_fit`](../nitrix-stats-hgp/hgp_fit.qmd)). |
| `boundary` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1.5` | HSGP marginal parameters (see [`hsgp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/hsgp_basis.qmd)); `rho` defaults to the data half-range (a fixed value -- lengthscale estimation is [`hgp_fit`](../nitrix-stats-hgp/hgp_fit.qmd)). |
| `bounds` | `Optional[Tuple[float, float]]` | ‚Äî | `None` | HSGP marginal parameters (see [`hsgp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/hsgp_basis.qmd)); `rho` defaults to the data half-range (a fixed value -- lengthscale estimation is [`hgp_fit`](../nitrix-stats-hgp/hgp_fit.qmd)). |
| `center` | `bool` | ‚Äî | `False` | Sum-to-zero each group's smooth (default `False` -- the group curves carry their own level, the usual factor-smooth; set `True` to pair with an explicit per-group mean). |
| `n_levels` | `Optional[int]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Number of levels `L` (defaults to `int(group.max()) + 1`); pass it when a level is absent so the block width is stable. |

**Returns** `_FactorGPBasis`. A factor-smooth GP basis (a [`SmoothBasis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/SmoothBasis.qmd)) for [`gam_fit`](../nitrix-stats-gam/gam_fit.qmd); the single Fellner-Schall smoothing parameter on this block is the shared group precision $1 / \sigma_{grp}^2$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:gp_factor_smooth -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
